<features>
- observable feature: long fur
- observable feature: pointed ears
- observable feature: green eyes
</features>
<kb>
- IF [long fur AND pointed ears AND green eyes] THEN [20]
- IF [white fur AND pointed ears AND tongue out] THEN [29]
- IF [brown and white fur AND large head AND droopy jowls] THEN [28]
- IF [black and white spotted fur AND long floppy ears] THEN [13]
</kb>

<rule_check>
- Rule 1 fires because the image shows a cat with long fur, pointed ears, and green eyes, which matches the features for class 20.
</rule_check>

<response>20</response>
